description: HetznerConfig represents the desired configuration of each machine provisioned within a machine pool associated with a provisioning.cattle.io cluster.

autoCreateFirewallRules.description: Automatically create firewall rules for RKE2 inter-node communication

clusterId.description: Cluster identifier for shared firewall and resource labeling

createFirewall.description: Create a new firewall for the server

existingSshKey.description: Use an existing SSH key by name or ID (added alongside the auto-generated key)

firewallName.description: Name for the created firewall (default: rancher-<cluster-name>)

firewalls.description: Firewall IDs or names to apply to the server

image.description: Hetzner Cloud image name or ID (e.g. ubuntu-24.04, debian-12)

networks.description: Network IDs or names to attach to the server

serverLocation.description: Hetzner Cloud server location (e.g. fsn1, nbg1, hel1)

serverType.description: Hetzner Cloud server type (e.g. cx23, cx33, cx43)

usePrivateNetwork.description: Use private network for machine communication

userData.description: Cloud-init user data (string or file path)
